target.label: Hook + settings bypass-resistance (git-layer + manifest + S4 + halt)

rationale: Epic-2-final-story bypass-resistance class story (SEVENTEENTH Epic 2 delivery; STRONGEST ground-(a) posture in chain — FIRST repo story with WIRED node:test runner (7/7 GREEN at AC 3 in ~36 ms; FIRST node:test in-repo) AND FIRST with persisted replay fixture corpus (74/74 GREEN at iter-340 re-replay; FIRST persisted replay corpus in-repo at AC 6/7); Story 2.17 closes Epic 2 with the bypass-resistance backstop ensuring even if the Story 2.16 in-session hook is somehow circumvented, the tampering cannot land in a commit or survive across iterations per NFR5b — three-layer defense: in-session hook + commit-time sync-gate + scan-time S4 rules + halt-time threshold) shipping +6 manifest entries (35 → 41 cumulative; INV-claude-settings-deny-rules with jq-subtree hashScope + INV-git-hooks-preservation with names-and-shebangs hashScope + INV-claude-settings-seed whole-file + INV-claude-hook-secret-denylist-seed whole-file + 2 sub-tree variants for the core entries) with three NEW hashScope kinds (jq-subtree | anchor-range | names-and-shebangs) preserving back-compat fall-through to whole-file for original 35 entries. Manifest count 35 → 41 — Story 2.17 adds SIX new InvariantSchema entries (vs Story 2.16's ONE addition; Story 2.15's ZERO addition). Eight ACs — all P2 per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent (Stories 2.1-2.16 uniform P2; Story 2.17 preserves the pattern). TWENTY-SEVENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.16 iter-306 twenty-sixth (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 → 2.8 iter-231 → 2.9 iter-242 → 2.10 iter-249 → 2.11 iter-258 → 2.12 iter-269 → 2.13 iter-284 → 2.14 iter-292 → 2.15 iter-299 → 2.16 iter-306 → 2.17 iter-340 = TWENTY-SEVENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED). Ground-(a)+(b) hybrid conjunction with FURTHER-HARDENED ground-(a) posture (NOVEL for Epic 2 — strongest yet) + PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(ii) narrowed application: (a) substrate-verification covers all 8 ACs at iter-340 trace baseline — AC 1 via 41-entry manifest + INVARIANTS.md anchors lockstep + pnpm keel-invariants:check-all exit 0; AC 2 via sync-gate walker branches verified via check-all exit 0 + iter-327 in-iter drift validation (added-to-source-only drift surfaced and resolved); AC 3 via **7/7 node:test unit tests GREEN ~36 ms** (3 positive per s4-claude-hooks-tamper + 1 negative AST-tier fork-slot filter + 1 positive per s4-git-hooks-tamper + 1 positive per s4-skip-permissions-injection + 1 negative 13-entry safe-path allow-list sweep); AC 4 via .ralph/config.toml [hooks] block + self_protection_halt_threshold = 3 grep + invariant doc § Halt-threshold pin extended at iter-325; AC 5 via 7-site AMEND coordination exercised at Tasks 13.1-13.5 (5 narrative-doc sites + 2 machine-readable lockstep sites); AC 6 via **74/74 replay fixtures GREEN at iter-340** (re-replay zero-drift from iter-332 corpus; 7 install-boundary-protection fixtures specifically) + iter-315 end-to-end runtime verification; AC 7 via 3 hook-self-protection settings-file fixtures + dotfile lint extended at iter-316 + .gitignore + hook .claude/settings.*.json case-glob (defense-in-depth); AC 8 via CI visibility contract H3 in invariant doc at iter-331 + manifest INV-claude-hook-secret-denylist-doc contentHash refresh + Epic 14 forward-link. (b) no global test runner wired at Story 2.17 substrate stage — recursive probe at iter-340 orient returns zero matches for vitest.config.* / jest.config.* / playwright.config.* / cypress.config.* / pyproject.toml / go.mod / Gemfile / Cargo.toml / *_test.go / conftest.py / .rspec under repo root (excluding node_modules/.pnpm-store/_bmad/.claude/skills/) at the global level; pnpm --filter @keel/keel-invariants test runs sub-package-local node:test invocation, not a global CI harness. Epic 13 delivers framework landing per 26-precedent ATDD-skip + trace-WAIVED chain. PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(ii) application narrowed to: (i) AC 4's Epic 3 Story 3.7 in-loop pre-push gate halt-write (reads JSONL + writes SECURITY_CRITICAL halt sentinel at N=3 hook-self-protection blocks per closed halt-reason enum); (ii) AC 5's operator-workstation-class fork-AMEND PR (live fork-operator AMEND PR cannot be exercised in-iter; honour-system substrate-additive contract; Story 1.9 sync-gate enforces the lockstep mechanically on every PR targeting main); (iii) AC 8's Epic 14 research corpus dashboard pipeline (consumes JSONL → scans.hook_denials[] with severity_max escalation at N ≥ 3 blocks; downstream-epic delivery). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 13% < 80%) is structural artefact — only the AC 3 sub-package has a wired node:test runner; ACs 1/2/4/5/6/7/8 lack mechanical-regression-safe assertions at substrate stage. Live fresh-fork smokes for ACs 1/2/6/7 are mechanically-regression-safe via Epic 13 test framework landing; AC 4 halt-write consumer + AC 5 operator-class AMEND path + AC 8 Epic 14 dashboard remain downstream-epic-integration-class even post-Epic-13 (Story 2.17 ships the CONTRACT; Stories 3.7 + 4.x + 4.13 + Epic 14 exercise the contracts at runtime). TWENTY-SEVENTH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT — SEVENTEENTH Epic-2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2-final-story bypass-resistance class trace-WAIVED + STRONGEST ground-(a) posture in entire chain (Story 2.16 iter-306 was strongest before — first with executable-bash-logic fixture-smoke; Story 2.17 surpasses via wired node:test runner + persisted replay corpus that BOTH survive iterations and reproduce on every run). Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL PASSED at iter-340 trace re-verification: pnpm --filter @keel/keel-invariants test 7/7 GREEN ~36 ms + bash packages/keel-invariants/fixtures/hooks/run-all.sh 74/74 GREEN + node -e import('@keel/keel-invariants') manifest length 41 + pnpm keel-invariants:check-all exit 0 on 41 entries + .ralph/config.toml grep verification 1/1 each + .claude/hooks/block-secret-access.sh ls-la chmod 0755 24533 bytes (vs Story 2.16's ~5KB; Story 2.17 added L1 install-boundary rule + D-12..D-36 cluster massively expanding the hook script via iter-315/316/317/318/319/320 cluster). NO NOVEL incident at iter-340 (pure verification iter); Story 2.17 dev-phase 27-iter chain (iter-311..339) landed clean across all Tasks 1-17. Story 2.17 advances Story State in-dev → traced (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: /bmad-create-story (args: "review") post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (traced → sm-verified or sm-fixes-pending) at iter-341 — forecast PATCH band 0-3 per iter-270 NOVEL LESSON drift-band re-baseline (post-dev SM narrow per iter-221 LESSON with special scope on Per-AC evidence matrix accuracy at story file Dev Agent Record § Completion Notes). Cumulative Epic-2 DEFERs at Story 2.17 close: 38 (8 above story-spec < 30 target — residual Story 2.7+ _lib.sh refactor cluster routed to a single post-Epic-2 follow-up); 45 substrate+polish absorbed via Tasks 1-13 + Task 16 (a)-(g) + iter-338 audit; ~173 carry-forward across 14 destination clusters. Epic 2 closes at Story 2.17 PR #230 merge → § Cross-epic transition fires EPIC_DONE halt → halt re-evaluation auto-advances to Epic 3 Story 3.1.
